task_description: Assess the risks of migrating a legacy monolithic application to a microservices architecture. The project has a 6-month timeline and a team of 8 engineers.

risk_factors.name: Data migration complexity
risk_factors.description: 12 years of accumulated data across 85 tables with complex relationships

risk_factors.name: Team expertise gap
risk_factors.description: Only 2 of 8 engineers have microservices experience

risk_factors.name: Integration dependencies
risk_factors.description: 15 external systems rely on the current API contracts

risk_factors.name: Downtime constraints
risk_factors.description: 99.9% SLA allows only 8.7 hours of downtime per year

risk_factors.name: Incomplete documentation
risk_factors.description: Roughly 20% of the codebase has documentation

risk_factors.name: Testing gaps
risk_factors.description: Only 35% test coverage, many untested code paths

input_data.context: Financial services company with regulatory compliance requirements
